nl_question: For delivered orders, group by customer_state (only states with at least 500 orders). For each state compute: the order count, the average promised days (purchase to estimated delivery), the median actual delivery days, the 95th percentile of actual delivery days, and the current late rate. Then compute a recommended promise equal to the 95th percentile of actual delivery days, and the difference between that recommended promise and the current average promised days. Order by that difference ascending.
sql: SELECT c."customer_state", COUNT(*) AS order_count, ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF('day', TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_purchase_timestamp"), TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_estimated_delivery_date"))), 1) AS avg_promised_days, ROUND(MEDIAN(DATEDIFF('day', TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_purchase_timestamp"), TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_delivered_customer_date"))), 1) AS median_actual_days, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY DATEDIFF('day', TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_purchase_timestamp"), TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_delivered_customer_date"))), 1) AS p95_actual_days, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_delivered_customer_date") > TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_estimated_delivery_date") THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_rate_pct, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY DATEDIFF('day', TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_purchase_timestamp"), TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_delivered_customer_date"))), 1) AS recommended_promise_days, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY DATEDIFF('day', TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_purchase_timestamp"), TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_delivered_customer_date"))) - AVG(DATEDIFF('day', TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_purchase_timestamp"), TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(o."order_estimated_delivery_date"))), 1) AS promise_difference_days FROM "BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE"."BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE"."OLIST_ORDERS" o JOIN "BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE"."BRAZILIAN_E_COMMERCE"."OLIST_CUSTOMERS" c ON o."customer_id" = c."customer_id" WHERE o."order_status" = 'delivered' GROUP BY c."customer_state" HAVING COUNT(*) >= 500 ORDER BY promise_difference_days ASC
